title: Rumours of the Reach (patron & adventure seeds)
note: Feeds the seed deck and Random-Event interpretations (Remote Event / NPC Action / Move Toward a Thread). A rumour is a DOORWAY, not a guarantee — surface the hook, let the crew choose, keep spoilers gated. The (→ NN) tag names the episode it can open.

entries.value: A fat, slow prize is routed through a nearby lane — a score worth chasing (→ raiding / 02 Treasure Ship)
A port contact / court holo dangles a paying job (→ 11 Patrons & Opportunities)
Aslan ihatei are massing near the border; a warlord may unite them (→ 03 Ihatei! / 14 Friends in Dry Places)
A Sindalian treasure or lost vault has surfaced in the rumour mill (→ 05 Treasure of Sindal / 18 Shadows of Sindal)
The Imperial Navy is asking questions about the 'pirate world' (→ Heat / 06 Game of Sun & Shadow)
A world is quietly courting outside help against a rival or threat (→ empire-building / world recruitment)
A rival corsair band is muscling in — or uniting raiders into a fleet (→ corsair-warlord thread)
GeDeCo is meddling on a world — leverage, or a wall (→ 07 Vorito Gambit / 17 Liberty Port)
A derelict, a downed ship, or a stranded somebody is out there (→ salvage / 16 Lions of Thebus)
Court politics at Drinax stir — Oleb, Rao, Harrick, Wrax (→ 09 Blood of the Star Dragon, foreshadow)
A debt, favour, or old contact comes due (→ 08 The Prodigal Outcast / crew Connections)
Unrest or revolt brews on a corporate or oppressed world (→ 13 Revolution on Acrid / 15 Cordan Conflict)
An exotic-tech, anomaly, or 'god' lead draws the curious (→ 04 The Demon's Eye / 12 Gods of Marduk)
News of a great-power move — a war scare, a treaty, a fleet shift — changes the board
A betrayal, a leak, or a spy is exposed (someone's secret is suddenly worth money)
A wild card — roll a Mythic Random Event (oracle.py event) for the real twist
